diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect.py
+++ b/inspect.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import sys, os, inspect

+

+# Print parts of TripoSR source to understand render API

+print("=== system.py (excerpt) ===")

+with open('tsr/tsr/system.py', 'r') as f:

+    src = f.read()

+    # Find the render method

+    import re

+    match = re.search(r'def render\(.*?\):.*?(?=\n    def )', src, re.DOTALL)

+    if match:

+        print(match.group())

+    else:

+        print(src[:3000])

+

+print("\n=== nerf_renderer.py (excerpt) ===")

+with open('tsr/tsr/models/nerf_renderer.py', 'r') as f:

+    print(f.read()[:3000])

+

+sys.path.insert(0, 'tsr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+print("\n=== TSR.render source ===")

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

+

+print("\n=== Renderer type and dir ===")

+# Load model to inspect renderer (will be done in test script, skip here)

--- a/test_predict.py
+++ b/test_predict.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import sys, os

+sys.path.insert(0, 'tsr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import PIL.Image

+

+ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/triposr'

+model = TSR.from_pretrained(ckpt_path, config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')

+model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)

+model.to('cuda')

+

+val_dir = '/data/val'

+objs = sorted(os.listdir(val_dir))

+if not objs:

+    print('No val objects')

+    sys.exit(1)

+obj_name = objs[0]

+obj_path = os.path.join(val_dir, obj_name)

+input_path = os.path.join(obj_path, 'input.png')

+print(f'Processing {obj_name}')

+img = PIL.Image.open(input_path).convert('RGB')

+scene_codes = model([img], device='cuda')

+frames = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=11, return_type='pil')

+out_dir = 'test_renders'

+os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)

+for i, frame in enumerate(frames):

+    view_id = i+1

+    frame.save(os.path.join(out_dir, f'view_{view_id:02d}.png'))

+print(f'Saved {len(frames)} views to {out_dir}')
